overall.description: A ship simulation showing the view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through open ocean waters during twilight hours. The scene features functional navigation displays including radar and chart plotters, with the ship's bow cutting through moderate seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring navigation displays while sailing through open waters

entered.detail: leftmost screen showing chart plotter with blue background and vessel position marker
central circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding contacts
rightmost screen showing depth sounder and navigation data with orange gradient display
red-painted bow deck of the vessel with safety railings and anchor equipment visible through the window
grey overcast sky meeting the dark ocean waters at the distant horizon line

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through open ocean waters. Three navigation displays dominate the upper frame, with the central radar actively sweeping. The ship's bow cuts through moderate seas under an overcast twilight sky, with no other vessels or landmarks visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from a ship's bridge as it navigates a desolate expanse of open ocean under a twilight sky. It begins with a focused view of the vessel's bow cutting through moderate seas, while three navigation displays dominate the upper frame. As the ship moves forward, the central radar continues its active sweep, scanning a horizon devoid of other vessels or landmarks. The scene maintains this consistent trajectory, gliding through the overcast atmosphere as the ship pushes deeper into the gray, undulating waters.
